data.description: Lift search()/_haystack() from ticket-search.py into ticket_reducer; lift find_ready_tickets()/blocked_by from ticket-ready.py into ticket_graph. Rewrite the hyphenated CLI scripts (and ticket-ready.sh chain) as thin shims. Pure refactor: zero output change, existing + extended parity tests green. Part of the recommendation-#2 native-reads plan.
data.title: Step 1: finish read-path single-source-of-truth extraction (search + ready into packages)
